title: GEEPAS Electric Bug Killer | UV Light Fly Zapper Insect Killer for Mosquitoes, Moths, Wasps & Flies Indoor Use | 80ft Coverage Chemical-Free Pest Control| Removable Washable Tray | Bug Catcher, 16W
features: ✅ ENERGY-EFFICIENT 16W UV FLY ZAPPER – Featuring 2x8W UV bulbs, this electric insect killer effectively attracts and eliminates mosquitoes, flies, and wasps in seconds. Designed for low power consumption, it serves as a reliable bug zapper, fly killer, insect trap, and wasp eliminator, keeping your home or workplace pest-free.

✅ WIDE 80FT COVERAGE & REPLACEABLE TUBES – This fly zapper provides effective pest control with an UV light that attracts flying insects from up to 80 feet away. The replaceable UV tubes ensure long-term performance, keeping your home insect-free.

✅ CHEMICAL-FREE & ODOURLESS PEST CONTROL – Say goodbye to harmful sprays, pesticides, and toxic fumes! This fly killer operates without chemicals or strong odours, making it safe for kitchens, hospitals, and homes with children and pets.

✅ WALL-MOUNTABLE OR FREE-STANDING DESIGN – Designed for convenience, this bug zapper can be mounted on a wall (chain included) or placed on a flat surface. The removable washable tray collects dead insects for easy disposal, while the self-cleaning electric grid minimizes maintenance.

✅ QUIET & SAFE OPERATION – Unlike noisy bug zappers, this low-noise fly killer operates quietly, making it ideal for bedrooms, offices, and restaurants. The protective safety grid prevents accidental contact, ensuring safe use around family and pets.

✅EASY SET UP – Each electric fly killer zapper comes with a chain so you can hang it anywhere on a hook or place it atop any countertop, table, or even the floor in problem areas. Typically, hang it high as that is where the nuisances hangout.
description: Product Description AUTOMATIC PEST KILLER It is designed for hassle free operation. EASY CLEANUP The protective net is also Removable to make cleaning easy. The electric grid is self-cleaning. NON TOXIC & ODUR FREE SMELL No more pesticides or potentially harmful sprays. It doesn't have any bad smell makes it safe choice for your home. EASY TO USE Easy to use and maintenance free; Simply plug in the bug zapper and watch the device eliminate all annoying flies. 2X 8W TUBES It has two 8 Watt tubes fixed inside. These tubes are replaceable & can be refilled easily. ADVANCED TECHNOLOGY This bug killer works automatically and emits powerful attractant ultraviolet rays. PORTABLE & USER FRIENDLY This device is lightweight and can easily be moved from one place to another. HANGING FEATURE Stands on its own or can be hung onto the wall with a chain Hanger (included).
